params.name: Koh-i-Noor Diamond
params.source: ART Master Scrolls (34.7%), Fragment Crafting (18.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.68%)
params.description:
On Jul 29, 1895, Queen Victoria set this diamond on the Crown of Queen Elizabeth The Queen Mother. This massive diamond inlaid on the Crown of Queen Elizabeth, the Koh-i-Noor, is a cursed one. Any man who owns it will rule the world but be cursed with terrible luck. Only a god or a woman can wear it and be safe. The Persian Emperor Nader Shah was assassinated after getting the diamond. Later, King George VI acquired it and died soon after! [Basic Info] Origin: Kola Mine, India
Type: Diamon …
